subject: NACK: message rejected at archivist
body:
Your message (task_id=unknown, type=ack) was rejected.
Reason: OUTPUT_PROVENANCE_MISSING
Detail: body lacks OUTPUT_PROVENANCE header. Missing: OUTPUT_PROVENANCE:, agent:, lane:, target:. All agent output must include OUTPUT_PROVENANCE:, agent:, lane:, target:.
